NanoBK DNS Apply — Advanced Details

Record plan:
  A     pr***y.ex***e.com  203.0.113.xxx  action=create  ownership=none
  AAAA  pr***y.ex***e.com  2001:db8:…     action=update  ownership=nanobk_owned

API plan:
  GET count: 2
  POST count: 1
  PATCH count: 1
  DELETE count: 0

Transport:
  fake_transport: true

Still hidden:
  API token
  auth header
  API request body
  API response
  record identifiers
